changelogs:
Updated to 2.1.1

Added:

Multi-Instance
- Rewrote mutex lock to use a background thread
- Fixed a crash for users whose systems returned ERROR_ACCESS_DENIED when getting mutex
- The launcher no longer minimizes to tray after launch unless multi-instance or activity watcher is enabled

Bootstrapper
- Fixed a bug where switching exploit sync to "None" kept a stale Roblox version causing updates to break
- Version displayed is accurate for custom dirs now
